description: Quantified event vectors for crisis key figures — numerical representation for state space integration
methodology: Each action is encoded as a vector of market impact dimensions. Values derived from documented historical market reactions: equity indices, bond yields, FX rates, VIX readings, and policy regime changes. Contagion scope and reversibility are calibrated against subsequent economic literature and IMF post-crisis assessments.

dimension_notes.equity_market_direction: -1 (severe crash) to +1 (strong rally). 0 = no meaningful move.
dimension_notes.bond_market_direction: -1 (yields spike / risk-off fails) to +1 (yields drop / flight to safety succeeds). Positive = lower yields / safe-haven bid.
dimension_notes.currency_direction: -1 (sharp depreciation of affected/domestic currency) to +1 (appreciation). Context: affected country's currency unless noted.
dimension_notes.volatility_impact: 0 (no VIX effect) to 1 (extreme spike, VIX > 40). Calibrated: 0.3 = mild, 0.6 = significant, 0.9 = extreme.
dimension_notes.contagion_scope: 0 (single asset/market) to 1 (fully global systemic). 0.3 = regional, 0.6 = multi-region, 0.9 = global synchronized.
dimension_notes.policy_regime_shift: 0 (continuation of existing policy) to 1 (full paradigm change, e.g., end of fixed rate era, new policy framework). 0.5 = major shift within existing regime.
dimension_notes.duration_of_impact_months: Estimated months of statistically significant market impact. Structural changes may score higher even if acute phase is brief.
dimension_notes.reversibility: 0 (permanent structural change, no return to prior state) to 1 (fully temporary, markets/policy return to baseline within impact duration).

events.actor_zh: 乔治·索罗斯 / 量子基金
events.action: Thai baht short attack — sustained selling of baht forwards forcing BOT to exhaust $33B reserves

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.8: SET index fell ~75% peak-to-trough over crisis. Immediate shock -15% in weeks following float.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.3: Thai yields spiked as capital fled; no safe-haven bid within Thailand. Slight regional spillover compressed UST yields.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.92: THB lost ~55% vs USD within 6 months of float. Near-maximal depreciation event.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.85: VIX spiked from ~17 to ~28 in July 1997; regional equity vol extreme.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.70: Triggered chain reaction across PHP, IDR, MYR, KRW, HKD — regional but not initially global.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: End of managed peg era for multiple Asian currencies. BOT's policy framework destroyed.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Full recovery of regional currencies and equity markets took 18-24 months.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.25: Structural damage to Thai financial sector. Several banks never reopened. Partial recovery only.

events.narrative_zh: 量子基金持续做空泰铢远期合约，逼迫泰国央行耗尽330亿美元外汇储备。1997年7月2日泰铢被迫浮动，单日贬值18%，触发亚洲金融危机传导链——菲律宾比索、印尼盾、马来西亚林吉特、韩元相继崩溃。

events.actor_zh: 乔治·索罗斯 / 量子基金
events.action: Hong Kong dollar short attack — speculative assault on HKD peg during double-play (stocks + currency)

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.55: HSI fell ~23% in Aug 1997 due to interest rate defense of peg (overnight rates spiked to 300%).
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.10: HKD peg defense via rate hike slightly supported HKD bonds short-term.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.05: HKD peg held. Minimal depreciation. Attack failed. Near-zero net currency move.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.75: Extreme overnight rates and equity crash created severe local volatility.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.45: Primarily Hong Kong with spillover to mainland-linked stocks and regional sentiment.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.15: HKMA defended peg successfully; no regime change. Minor: introduced stock market intervention (unprecedented).
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 4: Markets stabilized within 4 months after HKMA share purchases proved effective.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.85: Near-fully reversed. HKD peg survived, HSI recovered. Precedent set for market intervention.

events.narrative_zh: 索罗斯采用'双边押注'策略同时做空港股和港元，试图通过高利率防守迫使港股崩溃。港府罕见直接入市购买蓝筹股，动用1180亿港元捍卫联系汇率制度，最终击退攻击。此役标志着政府市场干预边界的重新划定。

events.actor_zh: 马哈蒂尔·穆罕默德
events.action: Malaysia capital controls and MYR peg at 3.8 — September 1 1998 comprehensive capital account closure

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.35: KLCI stabilized and recovered modestly after controls removed speculative selling pressure.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.20: Domestic bond market stabilized with capital controls preventing yield spiral.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.60: MYR stabilized at 3.80 peg after prior -45% depreciation. Effective appreciation vs free-float counterfactual.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.25: Controls reduced volatility. Negative score = volatility-reducing event.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: -0.30: Negative contagion = isolated Malaysia from regional crisis transmission, reducing scope of continued spread.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.80: First full capital account closure by a middle-income country in modern era. Major paradigm departure from IMF orthodoxy.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: Controls maintained until 2005 for some components; full liberalization took years.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.30: Structural shift in how Malaysia manages capital flows. IMF relations permanently altered. Partial reversal only.

events.narrative_zh: 马哈蒂尔宣布马来西亚实施全面资本管制，林吉特以3.8兑1美元固定汇率，禁止离岸林吉特交易。此举违背IMF正统，却有效切断了危机传导。事后马来西亚经济复苏速度快于接受IMF援助的国家，引发国际货币体系深层争议。

events.actor_zh: 朱镕基
events.action: RMB non-devaluation pledge — China commits to hold RMB despite regional depreciation pressure

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.30: Pledge provided stabilizing signal to regional markets, moderating equity losses.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.25: Reduced fear of competitive devaluations; slight benefit to regional bond markets.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.15: China held RMB steady at ~8.28. Modest positive for regional currency stability.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.20: Volatility-reducing commitment. Credible anchor reduced contagion fears.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: -0.40: Significantly reduced crisis contagion scope by removing China as potential 'next domino.'
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.45: Established China as responsible stakeholder in Asian financial architecture. Precursor to later internationalization.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 30: RMB held stable through 1997-1999 Asian recovery period.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.45: Policy eventually changed (managed float 2005), but pledge served its stabilizing purpose in crisis.

events.narrative_zh: 朱镕基承诺人民币不贬值，在亚洲货币竞相崩溃的背景下提供关键稳定锚。中国以牺牲出口竞争力为代价，防止了新一轮竞争性贬值浪潮，赢得国际声誉，为此后在全球金融治理中的话语权奠定基础。

events.actor_zh: 米歇尔·康德苏 / IMF
events.action: Thailand IMF bailout program — $17.2B package with fiscal austerity, bank closures, interest rate hikes

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.20: IMF austerity worsened near-term economic contraction, equities continued falling despite bailout.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: External financing reduced sovereign default risk; slight bond stabilization.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.25: IMF support provided floor for THB, halting freefall even if not reversing it immediately.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.50: Conditionality uncertainty and bank closures maintained elevated volatility.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.30: IMF program template later applied to Indonesia and Korea, establishing precedent.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Forced structural reform of Thai banking sector, capital account rules, and fiscal framework.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: IMF structural conditions shaped Thai policy for 2 years minimum.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.40: Banking system reforms largely permanent. Austerity conditions temporary but scarring.

events.narrative_zh: IMF向泰国提供172亿美元救助，要求关闭58家金融机构、提高利率、削减财政赤字。紧缩条件加深了经济衰退，失业率飙升。这一模式随后在印尼（430亿美元）和韩国（580亿美元）复制，引发关于IMF处方适用性的深刻争议。

events.actor_zh: 米歇尔·康德苏 / IMF
events.action: Indonesia IMF program — $43B package; Suharto political instability collapses reform implementation

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.75: Jakarta Composite fell ~65% during crisis. IMF program failed to halt decline as political crisis compounded.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.40: Sovereign spreads exploded despite IMF program. Political risk overwhelmed program credibility.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.85: IDR lost ~83% vs USD peak-to-trough, worst in region. Program implementation failure.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.90: Extreme: combined currency, equity, political collapse. Ethnic violence erupted.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.65: Indonesia's scale made its crisis deeply contagious to regional sentiment and commodity markets.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.70: Suharto's fall ended 30-year regime. Transition to democracy = fundamental political regime change.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 30: Indonesian economy took over 2 years to stabilize; political transition ongoing much longer.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.20: Structural damage to Indonesian financial sector, political system, and social cohesion. Low reversibility.

events.narrative_zh: IMF印尼计划因苏哈托政治危机而陷入执行困境。当IMF要求取消燃油补贴时，全国爆发骚乱，苏哈托下台。印尼盾贬值83%，成为亚洲危机中破坏最深重的案例，揭示了忽视政治稳定的经济改革方案的致命缺陷。

events.actor_zh: 米歇尔·康德苏 / IMF
events.action: Korea IMF program — $58B record bailout; chaebol restructuring, capital account opening

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.45: KOSPI fell ~70% during crisis but recovered more strongly than Thailand/Indonesia, reflecting stronger institutions.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.20: Korea's stronger fundamentals meant IMF support improved bond market conditions more effectively.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.60: KRW fell ~60% at worst but stabilized relatively quickly post-program.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.80: 'IMF shock' entered Korean cultural vocabulary; extreme uncertainty during Dec 1997.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: Korea's size made its crisis globally significant; triggered LTCM-adjacent stress.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.75: Fundamental transformation of Korean corporate governance, chaebol structure, and financial system openness.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Korea achieved fastest recovery of crisis countries; back to growth by 1999.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.55: Corporate reforms partially reversed as chaebols regained power, but financial openness permanent.

events.narrative_zh: 韩国获得580亿美元IMF最大单笔救助，代价是强制推进财阀（chaebol）重组和资本账户开放。'IMF冲击'成为韩国国家记忆，驱动此后对大规模外汇储备积累的执念，深刻影响东亚货币政策取向二十余年。

events.actor_zh: 榊原英資
events.action: Yen stabilization intervention — coordinated USD/JPY buying to halt yen depreciation threatening regional recovery

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.25: Yen stabilization reduced competitive devaluation fears, positive for Asian equity recovery.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: Reduced systemic stress slightly improved regional bond conditions.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.55: JPY rallied sharply from 147 to 130 vs USD after intervention signal; prevented yen collapse.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.30: Intervention reduced FX volatility. Confidence-boosting effect.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.25: Prevented additional transmission vector (weak yen threatening Korean/Japanese competition).
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.20: Established US-Japan coordinated intervention precedent; minor regime signal.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 6: JPY stabilization lasted ~6 months before further deterioration in 1998.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.70: Largely temporary; yen fundamentals unchanged. But precedent for G7 FX coordination durable.

events.narrative_zh: 榊原英资（'日元先生'）协调美日共同干预外汇市场，阻止日元跌破150关口。日元快速回升至130区间，防止了日元贬值引发新一轮亚洲竞争性贬值的风险。此举是二十年来最成功的G7汇率协调干预之一。

events.actor_zh: 蒂莫西·盖特纳 / 美联储
events.action: Bear Stearns rescue — JPMorgan acquisition facilitated by Fed's $29B non-recourse loan guarantee

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.35: Brief equity relief rally immediately after, but signaled deeper systemic stress. S&P -12% in March.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.30: Fed backstop reduced immediate default contagion; UST yields fell as flight-to-safety.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.10: USD slightly pressured by Fed action but contained; no major FX move.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.65: VIX spiked to 32 in March 2008. Market recognized this as systemic, not idiosyncratic.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.60: Revealed extent of interbank contagion risk; global financial institutions re-priced counterparty risk.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.50: First use of Fed Section 13(3) emergency powers since 1930s. Established 'too big to fail' precedent.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 6: Provided 6-month window before Lehman collapse in September.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.60: 'Too big to fail' moral hazard became permanent feature. Fed's Section 13(3) powers expanded then curtailed by Dodd-Frank.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储援引1930年代以来从未使用的紧急条款，向摩根大通提供290亿美元无追索权贷款担保，收购濒临倒闭的贝尔斯登。这是现代首个大型投资银行政府救助案例，确立了'大而不倒'先例，同时为市场带来短暂安慰，但6个月后雷曼倒闭证明危机远未结束。

events.actor_zh: 汉克·保尔森
events.action: Lehman Brothers bankruptcy — decision to allow Lehman to fail on September 15 2008

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.95: S&P 500 fell 45% from Lehman to March 2009 trough. Single most catastrophic modern equity event.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.70: Credit markets froze. LIBOR-OIS spread exploded to 365bp. Even UST experienced dislocations briefly.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.40: USD actually strengthened (flight to safety) but global EM currencies collapsed. Scoring affected currencies.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.98: VIX reached 89.53 on Oct 24 2008 — highest ever recorded. Near-maximum score.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.95: Simultaneously froze global interbank markets, money market funds, commercial paper, trade finance worldwide.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.90: Destroyed faith in self-regulating markets. Triggered regulatory overhaul in every major economy. Post-Lehman world fundamentally different.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 36: Markets took 3+ years to fully recover. Structural impacts (Dodd-Frank, Basel III) permanent.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.15: Structural changes to global finance, regulation, and central bank mandate largely permanent.

events.narrative_zh: 保尔森决定不救助雷曼兄弟，触发人类历史上最大规模的金融传染事件。次日货币市场基金'跌破面值'，全球银行间市场冻结，LIBOR-OIS利差暴涨至365个基点。此后6周内，各国央行和政府实施规模前所未有的紧急干预。VIX达到89.53的历史最高点。

events.actor_zh: 汉克·保尔森 / 美联储
events.action: AIG bailout — $85B government takeover to prevent $440B CDS notional triggering global default cascade

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.15: AIG rescue prevented immediate CDS default cascade; marginally positive vs counterfactual.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.25: Prevented triggering of CDS on major financial institution debt; credit markets partially functional.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.05: Minor USD effect; AIG rescue primarily contained systemic risk.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.55: Despite rescue, markets remained highly stressed. Lehman the same day dominated.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.70: AIG was counterparty to virtually every major global financial institution. Rescue prevented global cascade.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Government ownership of insurance conglomerate unprecedented. Expanded 'too big to fail' to non-banks.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: AIG restructuring and government exit took 18+ months.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.35: AIG rescued and eventually profitable. But CDS regulation fundamentally changed. Partial reversal.

events.narrative_zh: AIG因对大量次贷相关债务出售信用违约互换（CDS），面临440亿美元潜在违约敞口。政府以850亿美元紧急接管，防止触发全球金融机构的CDS连锁违约。若AIG破产，全球几乎所有主要银行将同时陷入危机。

events.actor_zh: 汉克·保尔森 / 美国国会
events.action: TARP passage — $700B Troubled Asset Relief Program signed October 3 2008 after initial House rejection

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.30: S&P rallied ~10% on TARP passage day; provided floor for financial sector equities.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.35: Government backstop improved bank bond conditions; spreads compressed from extremes.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.15: Minor USD positive; confidence-building measure.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.20: VIX declined from 60s to 50s range post-TARP. Volatility-reducing but still extreme levels.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.50: US-centric primarily, but signaled commitment that stopped global doom loop at critical moment.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.65: Government as major bank shareholder unprecedented in post-New Deal US. Began era of 'financialization of the state.'
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: TARP disbursements and recapitalization took 2 years to complete.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.40: Banks eventually repaid TARP. But regulatory regime (SIFI designation, stress tests) permanent.

events.narrative_zh: 国会首次否决后TARP法案加入4000亿美元'彩虹条款'重新通过。此后财政部将740亿美元注入8家大型银行（其中花旗获254亿）。TARP最终盈利约150亿美元，但'社会化损失、私有化收益'的愤怒孕育了茶党运动和占领华尔街运动。

events.actor_zh: 汉克·保尔森
events.action: Paulson 'bazooka' moment — Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac conservatorship placing GSEs under government control

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.20: GSE equity wiped out; but MBS market stabilized, providing net positive for broader equity market.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.40: Explicit government guarantee of $5T in GSE MBS dramatically compressed agency spreads.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.10: Marginal USD positive from reduced systemic risk.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.30: Reduced MBS market volatility significantly; mortgage market functioned again.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: GSEs held/guaranteed $5T mortgage debt; stabilization had global implications for MBS holders.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.70: Explicit vs implicit government guarantee crossed — largest government housing intervention in history. Still in conservatorship as of 2026.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 30: GSEs remained in conservatorship indefinitely; mortgage market restructuring ongoing.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.30: GSE reform promised but never delivered. Near-permanent structural change.

events.narrative_zh: 保尔森动用'火箭筒'将房利美和房地美置于政府接管，明确化此前隐性的政府担保，稳定了5万亿美元抵押贷款市场。但普通股和优先股股东损失惨重，打击了此前押注政府必然救助的机构投资者的信心。

events.actor_zh: 本·伯南克 / 美联储
events.action: QE1 launch — Fed announces purchase of $600B in agency MBS and $300B in Treasuries, November 2008

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.55: QE1 announcement marked near bottom; S&P +65% from March 2009 through QE1 end.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.65: 30-year mortgage rates fell from 6.5% to 4.5%. Most direct impact of any QE program.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.25: Dollar weakened over subsequent months as Fed balance sheet expanded. Intended effect.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.35: VIX trended down from 80 toward 20 over subsequent 12 months as QE backstop calmed markets.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.60: QE1 had global portfolio rebalancing effects — capital flows to EM, commodity prices recovered.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.90: First peacetime asset purchase program in Fed history. Permanently expanded central bank toolkit. Changed global monetary policy framework.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 48: QE1 through QE3 ran until 2014. Global central bank QE adoption ongoing as of 2026.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.20: QE as a policy tool permanently adopted by Fed, ECB, BOJ, BOE. Structural change in central banking.

events.narrative_zh: 伯南克宣布联储购买6000亿美元机构MBS和3000亿美元国债，开创量化宽松先河。此举将30年期抵押贷款利率从6.5%压低至4.5%，并向全球发出了'央行将无限量提供流动性'的信号。QE从此成为全球央行标配工具，从根本上改变了货币政策框架。

events.actor_zh: 阿利斯泰尔·达林 / 英国政府
events.action: UK bank nationalization — RBS and Lloyds-HBOS recapitalization; government takes majority stakes

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.25: UK bank equities diluted but system saved; FTSE stabilized vs collapse counterfactual.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.30: UK sovereign backing of banks compressed banking sector spreads.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.05: GBP relatively unaffected by nationalization per se; sterling weakness from broader UK recession.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.15: UK-specific volatility reduction from removing bank failure risk.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.40: UK action preceded US TARP; demonstrated European willingness to nationalize — influenced global template.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.65: First nationalization of major UK bank since 1970s. Changed relationship between state and finance in UK permanently.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 36: RBS remained state-owned until 2015+; full privatization took 7 years.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.35: Partial reversal as banks re-privatized, but regulatory changes (ring-fencing, Vickers Commission) permanent.

events.narrative_zh: 英国政府向苏格兰皇家银行（RBS）和劳埃德-HBOS注资，取得多数股权，执行欧洲历史上最大规模银行国有化。达林事后回忆，他在宣布前收到RBS CEO警告'下午五点前如果无法获得资金，我们将无法向客户支付款项'。

events.actor_zh: 温家宝 / 中国政府
events.action: China 4 trillion RMB stimulus package — massive infrastructure and fiscal expansion November 2008

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.50: Shanghai Composite rally; globally, China stimulus was the single biggest support for commodity/EM equity recovery.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.20: Credit expansion, slight yield pressure in China but positive for global growth bonds.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.30: RMB managed stability; stimulus supported commodity currencies (AUD, BRL) strongly.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.40: China stimulus was the primary global volatility-reducing factor alongside Fed QE. Commodity markets stabilized.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.70: China's GDP growth saved global commodity exporters (Australia, Brazil, Africa) from severe recession.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: Established China as global economic stabilizer of last resort. Shifted perception of China's role in global economy.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: Infrastructure projects running 2009-2011. Credit expansion effects lasted longer (shadow banking growth).
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.35: Infrastructure built is permanent. Credit expansion created shadow banking problems requiring years of deleveraging.

events.narrative_zh: 中国宣布4万亿人民币刺激计划（约5860亿美元），大规模投资铁路、公路、电网和保障房。中国经济在全球衰退中实现8.7%增长，成为全球增长引擎，拯救了澳大利亚、巴西等大宗商品出口国，但同时埋下过剩产能和地方政府债务风险的种子。

events.actor_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特
events.action: Goldman Sachs $5B preferred share investment — confidence signal at peak of crisis panic

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.30: Goldman stock rallied; broader market sentiment improved modestly on 'Buffett is buying' signal.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.20: Signaled Goldman solvent; Goldman bond spreads tightened.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.05: Negligible direct FX effect.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.20: Psychological anchor reduced fear premium. Buffett investment = credibility signal.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.30: Primarily Goldman/US financial sector. Global signal value disproportionate to transaction size.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.15: Established 'Buffett put' concept in market psychology; minor durable effect.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 3: Market sentiment improvement was temporary; broader panic resumed within days.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.90: Fully temporary in market impact. Buffett profit from Goldman preferred (10% coupon + warrants) was positive. No structural change.

events.narrative_zh: 巴菲特以每股优先股10%股息年收益率、附认股权证条款向高盛注入50亿美元。这笔被誉为'危机中的信心投票'的交易，向市场传递了'如果巴菲特认为高盛值得投资，那么最坏时刻或已过去'的信号，短暂抑制了恐慌蔓延。巴菲特最终从这笔交易中获利约30亿美元。

events.actor_zh: 伯纳德·麦道夫
events.action: Madoff Ponzi scheme confession — $65B fraud revealed December 2008, destroying remaining investor trust

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.30: Added to already-depressed equity market; particularly hit hedge funds and European feeder funds.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.10: Minor additional credit stress from European bank exposures (Santander, BNP, HSBC).
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.05: Negligible direct FX impact.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.40: Added uncertainty layer at already-extreme VIX levels. 'Who else is a fraud?' contagion.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.35: European feeder funds (Fairfield Greenwich, Maxam) had global investor base. Affected charities, universities, retirees.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.25: Led to enhanced SEC oversight of investment funds; alternative fund regulation tightened globally.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Recovery proceedings and investor psychology impact lasted ~1 year of additional crisis period.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.45: Victims recovered ~75 cents on dollar through Madoff trustee (Irving Picard). Partially reversed.

events.narrative_zh: 麦道夫向儿子坦白650亿美元庞氏骗局，两个儿子随即报警。这是历史上最大规模的证券欺诈，受害者包括桑坦德银行（31亿美元敞口）、BNP巴黎银行、史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格基金会和数千名退休人员。在金融危机已令投资者信心脆弱的时刻，此事件进一步摧毁了对金融监管体系的信任。

events.actor_zh: 美国国会 / 奥巴马政府
events.action: Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform Act — comprehensive financial regulation overhaul July 2010

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.10: Minor negative for financial sector earnings (compliance costs) but positive for system stability long-term.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: Reduced systemic risk premium in financial sector bonds.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.02: Negligible direct FX effect.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.20: Systemic risk reduction framework. SIFI designation + resolution mechanisms reduced tail risk.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.45: US rules set global standard; triggered Basel III, EU banking union, UK Vickers Commission.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.80: Largest financial regulatory overhaul since Glass-Steagall 1933. Volcker Rule, SIFI designation, CFPB, derivatives clearing mandates.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 120: 10-year regulatory implementation horizon; effects still being felt in 2026.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.25: Partially reversed by 2018 Economic Growth Act (raised SIFI threshold); but core architecture intact.

events.narrative_zh: 《多德-弗兰克法》建立了系统重要性金融机构（SIFI）监管框架、沃尔克规则（限制自营交易）、消费者金融保护局（CFPB）和OTC衍生品清算所强制要求。这是1933年格拉斯-斯蒂格尔法以来最大规模的金融监管改革，确立了全球金融监管新标准。

events.actor_zh: 欧洲央行 / 欧洲各国政府
events.action: European bank rescues — coordinated recapitalization and guarantees Oct-Nov 2008 (€1.7T total)

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.20: European bank equity sector stabilized post-recapitalization; broader Euro Stoxx supported.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.25: Government guarantees on bank debt dramatically reduced European bank funding costs.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.10: EUR slightly supported by coordinated government action reducing tail risk.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.25: Coordinated European action reduced eurozone-specific volatility.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.50: Covered major EU economies; prevented immediate banking system collapse across Europe.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Moved European banking supervision toward eventual banking union framework.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Initial stabilization, but sovereign debt crisis erupted 18 months later.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.45: Banks mostly returned to private ownership; but EU banking union (SSM/SRM) permanent institutional change.

events.narrative_zh: 欧洲各国政府协调推出总额1.7万亿欧元的银行救助计划，涵盖资本注入、债务担保和流动性支持。德国救助德意志银行和商业银行，法国支持法巴和兴业，比利时接管德克夏银行。短暂稳定后，希腊债务危机于2010年爆发，揭示欧元区主权-银行风险的螺旋结构。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 美国贸易代表
events.action: Initial $50B tariffs on Chinese goods — Section 301 tariffs on aerospace, IT, machinery (List 1 + 2)

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.25: US equity market -5% in weeks around announcement; tech and industrial sectors most affected.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: Modest flight to safety; 10yr yield fell slightly on growth concerns.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.15: CNY fell ~5% against USD through remainder of 2018.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.45: VIX spiked from 12 to 17 around tariff announcements; elevated through Q4 2018.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.40: US-China bilateral primarily; spillover to global supply chains and EM exports.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.45: First major departure from WTO rules-based trading system in post-1994 era.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Tariffs remained through Phase 1 deal (Jan 2020) and beyond.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.35: Phase 1 deal provided partial rollback; many tariffs remain in place as of 2026.

events.narrative_zh: 特朗普政府依据301条款对中国航空航天、信息技术、机械等340亿美元商品征收25%关税，随即引发中国等额报复。这是自1930年斯穆特-霍利关税法以来美国最重大的保护主义政策转向，重塑了全球供应链格局。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 美国贸易代表
events.action: $200B tariff escalation — List 3 tariffs at 10% raised to 25% on $200B of Chinese goods

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.45: S&P 500 fell ~7% in May 2019 on tariff escalation shock. Chinese equities -12%.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.20: 10yr UST fell from 2.6% to 2.1% as recession fears spiked; strong flight to safety.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.25: CNY tested 7.0 psychological level; EM currencies broadly weakened.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.65: VIX spiked to 20 from 13; May 2019 saw equity vol return to 2018 crisis levels.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: Affected global supply chains, semiconductor stocks, agricultural exporters worldwide.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.50: Escalation proved tariffs were negotiating tool not ceiling; changed all parties' strategic calculus.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Phase 1 deal signed January 2020 provided partial resolution.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.40: Phase 1 deal rolled back some 25% rates to 7.5%; structural tariff regime remained.

events.narrative_zh: 特朗普将2000亿美元中国商品关税从10%提高至25%，并威胁对剩余3250亿美元商品加征关税。中国拒绝在知识产权和补贴政策上做出结构性让步，贸易战升级为全面经济对抗。美联储此后以贸易不确定性为由降息三次。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 美国商务部
events.action: Huawei entity list ban — blocking US technology exports to Huawei and affiliates

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.35: Semiconductor sector (QCOM, INTC, AVGO, Skyworks) fell 10-25% on Huawei revenue loss.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.10: Tech sector stress had modest spillover to growth concerns and UST demand.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.10: Minor CNY pressure from tech sector uncertainty.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.55: Tech-specific volatility extreme; broader VIX elevated.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.60: Global semiconductor supply chain affected; Taiwan TSMC, South Korea Samsung forced to review supply agreements.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.75: Weaponization of export controls for geopolitical purposes. Established 'tech decoupling' as policy framework.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 48: Ongoing as of 2026; semiconductor supply chain reorganization multi-year.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.20: Huawei ban mostly maintained. China accelerated semiconductor self-sufficiency drive (SMIC, Kirin). Structural tech decoupling ongoing.

events.narrative_zh: 美国商务部将华为列入出口管制实体名单，切断其获取美国半导体和软件的渠道。高通、英特尔、博通股价单日暴跌，台积电被迫暂停供货。此举将贸易战升维至技术冷战，触发中国举国体制推进半导体自主，重塑全球半导体供应链格局。

events.actor_zh: 中国人民银行
events.action: RMB breaking 7 — PBOC allows CNY/USD to breach 7.0 psychological threshold

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.40: Global equity rout; US Treasury immediately labeled China a 'currency manipulator.' Asian equities -3% in one day.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.25: Flight to safety; 10yr UST fell to 1.70% (pre-COVID low at that point).
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.45: CNY/USD through 7 was major symbolic breach; EM currencies fell broadly in sympathy.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.70: One of sharpest single-day VIX spikes of 2019; market interpreted as escalation signal.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: EM currency selloff globally; perceived as PBOC's 'weapon' response to tariffs.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.40: PBOC demonstrated willingness to use currency as trade war lever; precedent for future depreciation.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 8: USD/CNY stabilized near 7.1-7.2 until Phase 1 deal strengthened yuan.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.60: CNY recovered below 7 after Phase 1 deal; breach was temporary but demonstrated PBOC's tools.

events.narrative_zh: 人民银行允许人民币兑美元汇率突破7关口，美国财政部随即将中国列为'汇率操纵国'（自1994年以来首次）。市场将此解读为中国以汇率贬值对冲关税影响的信号，引发全球金融市场急剧震荡，成为2019年贸易战最激烈的单日市场反应。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 习近平
events.action: Phase 1 trade deal signing — partial tariff rollback for Chinese purchase commitments

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.35: S&P 500 at record highs on deal signing; risk-on rally into January 2020.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.05: Slight yield increase on risk-on; modest.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.30: CNY appreciated ~3% vs USD post-deal. EM currencies broadly strengthened.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.30: VIX fell to 12-13 range. Deal removed near-term escalation risk.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.40: Positive spillover to EM and commodity currencies.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.30: Structural issues (subsidies, IP, forced tech transfer) unaddressed; more truce than resolution.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: COVID eliminated Phase 1 purchase commitments within 3 months.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.65: Deal partially reversed tariff escalation; but tariff architecture remained. COVID immediately superseded.

events.narrative_zh: 第一阶段贸易协议将部分关税从25%降至7.5%，中国承诺两年内增购2000亿美元美国商品（能源、农产品、制造业、服务）。然而协议签署仅两周后，武汉新冠疫情开始扩散，采购承诺随即成为泡影，贸易战进入新冷战阶段。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 美国贸易代表
events.action: Additional $300B List 4 tariffs on consumer goods — completed tariff coverage of nearly all Chinese imports

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.30: Consumer sector and retail stocks fell on input cost concerns; broader market -2%.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: Recession fears pushed UST demand up.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.15: CNY and AUD fell on China trade volume concerns.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.55: VIX elevated around announcement; trade uncertainty became permanent fixture.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.50: Covered consumer electronics (phones, laptops, clothing) — directly affected all US consumers.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.40: Completed near-total tariff coverage; tariffs became 'new normal' rather than negotiating signal.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 6: Phase 1 deal deferred further escalation.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.50: Partial rollback in Phase 1; substantial tariff regime remained.

events.narrative_zh: 特朗普宣布对剩余3000亿美元中国商品征收15%关税（部分推迟至12月），首次将消费电子产品（iPhone、笔记本电脑）纳入征税范围。这使美国几乎所有从中国进口的商品都面临关税，标志着贸易战从定向行业升级为全面经济脱钩战略。

events.actor_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔 / 美联储
events.action: Emergency rate cut March 3 2020 — 50bp emergency inter-meeting cut as COVID fears mount

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.15: Paradoxically negative — market interpreted emergency cut as signal of Fed panic; S&P fell 3% day of cut.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.30: 10yr UST yield fell from 1.15% to 0.90% on day; flight to safety.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.10: USD weakened slightly on cut; gold rallied.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.50: VIX at 36 and rising; cut amplified rather than calmed fears.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.40: US-centric but signaled global monetary policy easing cycle beginning.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.35: Emergency inter-meeting cut — significant signal of seriousness; but Oct 2019 cut was last 'insurance' cut.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 2: Superseded by March 15 cut.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.80: Rate was cut further and maintained; this specific cut was a step in a larger process.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储在非例行会议期间紧急降息50个基点，但市场将此解读为美联储恐慌的信号而非安慰剂。S&P500当日反而下跌3%。鲍威尔的新闻发布会措辞被批评为增加而非减少了不确定性，证明货币政策无法应对供给侧冲击。

events.actor_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔 / 美联储
events.action: Emergency rate cut to zero March 15 2020 — 100bp cut to 0-0.25% plus $700B QE announcement

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.20: S&P futures limit-down at Sunday night announcement; again paradoxical fear amplification.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.45: Major UST rally; 10yr yield touched 0.54% all-time low within days.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.15: USD initially weakened but then surged in dollar funding crisis the following week.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.60: VIX still rising toward 80; Sunday announcement amplified Monday circuit breakers.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: Global central banks followed: BOE, BOC, RBNZ all cut within days.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: Return to zero lower bound policy; QE reactivated. Established that ZLB is Fed's crisis default.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: Rates stayed at zero until March 2022.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.40: ZLB policy maintained 2 years; significant durable impact on asset pricing and yield curve.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储在周日晚间宣布降息100个基点至零利率，并重启7000亿美元量化宽松。市场期货触及跌停限制，投资者将此解读为形势极为严峻的信号。这是自2008年金融危机以来首次回归零利率，标志着全球货币政策进入非常规操作新阶段。

events.actor_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔 / 美联储
events.action: Unlimited QE and emergency facilities — March 23 2020 'whatever it takes' moment, unlimited asset purchases

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.70: March 23 was THE bottom; S&P +67% from that level over next 12 months. Most precise bottom-calling event in history.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.65: Credit markets immediately normalized; IG spreads compressed from 400bp toward 100bp within weeks.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.20: USD funding crisis resolved; dollar stabilized then weakened through 2020.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.55: VIX fell from near-80 toward 40 within days. Unlimited QE announcement was the volatility peak.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.70: Global credit markets normalized; EM central banks gained space to act. Most globally coordinated stabilization since 2008.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.85: 'Unlimited' was new word in Fed lexicon. Corporate bond purchases (Section 13(3)) for first time. Expanded toolkit to HY ETFs. Paradigm shift.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 30: Unlimited QE maintained through mid-2022 taper.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.25: Corporate bond facilities (SMCCF, PMCCF) were wound down; but precedent of Fed buying corporate debt permanent.

events.narrative_zh: 2020年3月23日，美联储宣布无限量资产购买并首次扩展到企业债（包括高收益债ETF），成为股市精确底部。此后12个月S&P500上涨67%。美联储无限量化宽松承诺终止了美元流动性危机，信用利差在数周内从400个基点压缩至100个基点，开创了央行'无所不能'的新纪元。

events.actor_zh: 美国国会 / 特朗普政府
events.action: CARES Act — $2.2 trillion fiscal stimulus including PPP, $1200 checks, expanded unemployment

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.60: $2.2T fiscal backstop was key reason US recovery was V-shaped rather than L-shaped.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.10: Treasury issuance surge pressured yields slightly; net positive for growth outlook.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.10: USD modestly supported by US fiscal capacity signaling.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.40: CARES Act passage was major volatility reducer; marked transition from panic to recovery.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.50: US-centric but $2.2T US demand stimulus had global spillover through imports and commodity demand.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.65: Helicopter money ($1200 direct checks) unprecedented in modern US. MMT-adjacent fiscal policy. $4T in FY2020 deficit.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Combined with subsequent stimulus ($900B Dec 2020, $1.9T ARP Mar 2021) through 2021.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.45: Fiscal expansion temporary but drove permanent expectations about government crisis response.

events.narrative_zh: 《CARES法》以2.2万亿美元规模成为美国历史上最大单笔财政刺激，涵盖薪资保护计划（PPP）、每人1200美元直接补贴、失业补助额外增加600美元/周。财政年度赤字达GDP的15%，但防止了消费断崖式下跌，为V型复苏奠定基础。

events.actor_zh: 克里斯蒂娜·拉加德 / 欧洲央行
events.action: Lagarde 'not here to close spreads' gaffe — press conference statement triggering Italian BTP selloff

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.30: European equities fell 4-5% on spread widening fears and ECB credibility damage.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.55: Italian BTP yields spiked 70bp in hours; spreads widened to 2018 crisis levels. Worst bond market response to ECB statement in history.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.25: EUR fell as ECB credibility undermined; fear of eurozone fragmentation.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.65: European volatility indices spiked; Spanish and Greek spreads moved with Italy.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.50: Primarily eurozone peripheral bonds; but systemic risk of eurozone fragmentation is globally significant.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.10: Minimal regime shift — statement was error quickly reversed by PEPP announcement.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 1: PEPP launched within a week reversing all spread moves.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.95: Almost fully reversed within 1 week by PEPP. Lagarde's credibility damage was lasting but market impact temporary.

events.narrative_zh: 拉加德在新闻发布会上表示'我们不是为了压缩利差而来的（We are not here to close spreads）'，意外引发意大利10年期国债收益率在数小时内飙升70个基点，欧洲股市暴跌。ECB随即紧急修正立场，并于一周后宣布7500亿欧元PEPP计划，完全逆转了这次发言的市场影响。

events.actor_zh: 克里斯蒂娜·拉加德 / 欧洲央行
events.action: PEPP launch — €750B Pandemic Emergency Purchase Programme, later expanded to €1.85T

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.50: European equities stabilized; Eurostoxx recovered strongly from crisis lows.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.65: Italian BTP-Bund spread collapsed from 270bp to 120bp within months. PEPP explicitly allowed flexible allocation.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.30: EUR strengthened on reduced fragmentation risk; eurozone tail risk removed.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.45: VSTOXX fell sharply on PEPP; European credit markets normalized.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.60: Demonstrated ECB could act as eurozone sovereign backstop; global EM risk appetite improved.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.70: PEPP's flexibility (no capital key constraint) was unprecedented; moved ECB toward OMT operationalization.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: PEPP ran through March 2022.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.30: APP replacement and TPI facility (July 2022) made PEPP-type flexibility permanent ECB toolkit.

events.narrative_zh: PEPP以不受资本金约束的灵活方式购买欧元区成员国国债，实质上履行了德拉吉2012年'不惜一切代价'承诺的技术执行。意大利-德国利差从270基点压缩至120基点，欧元区解体尾部风险基本消除。计划最终扩大至1.85万亿欧元。

events.actor_zh: 基思·吉尔 / WallStreetBets
events.action: GameStop short squeeze — retail coordinated short squeeze drives GME from $20 to $483

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.10: Broader market slightly negative on forced hedge fund deleveraging; net effect minimal on indices.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.00: No meaningful bond market impact.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.00: No FX impact.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.70: Meme stock VIX (specific to GME, AMC) extreme; broader VIX reached 37 from forced deleveraging.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.25: Primarily US retail brokerage sector; Melvin Capital lost 53%. Limited systemic contagion.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.35: Triggered SEC review of payment for order flow, short selling disclosure, clearing cycle reform.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 3: Regulatory review and meme stock era lasted through mid-2021.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.75: GME returned below $50 within months; no permanent market structure change from the squeeze itself.

events.narrative_zh: Reddit论坛WallStreetBets用户协调买入GameStop股票，逼空做空比例达140%的机构投资者，股价从20美元飙升至483美元。梅尔文资本损失53%，数家主要对冲基金被迫平仓。Robinhood限制GME交易引发国会听证，将散户资本主义与监管公平性争议推向历史高峰。

events.actor_zh: 英国政府 / 里希·苏纳克
events.action: UK furlough scheme — 80% wage subsidy covering 9.6M workers at peak, preventing mass unemployment

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.25: UK equities (FTSE) supported vs counterfactual of mass layoffs; consumer spending floor maintained.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.10: Gilt issuance increased but BOE QE absorbed; spreads stable.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.05: Modest GBP support from economic stabilization.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.20: UK-specific volatility reduced by preventing unemployment spike.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.25: UK-specific; but furlough model was adopted by Germany (Kurzarbeit), France, others.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.50: Direct government wage payment unprecedented outside wartime in UK; changed employer-state relationship.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Scheme ran March 2020 to September 2021.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.55: Scheme wound down; but triggered permanent debate about job guarantees and UBI.

events.narrative_zh: 英国政府推出'休假计划'，为员工支付80%工资，峰值覆盖960万工人，阻止了大规模失业。英国失业率仅升至5.1%（远低于预期的10%+），代价是4年内£70亿英镑财政成本。此方案成为欧洲疫情经济政策的主要模板。

events.actor_zh: 辉瑞/BioNTech宣布 + 市场
events.action: Vaccine efficacy announcement — Pfizer announces 90%+ efficacy November 9 2020; value/cyclical rotation

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.85: One of largest single-day equity rallies in history; DJIA +5%, cyclical/value stocks +15-30%.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.30: 10yr yields surged 15bp on reopening expectations; flight from safety reversed.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.25: USD weakened as global risk-on reversed safe-haven flows.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.50: VIX fell from 28 to 22 in days; structural volatility reduction as pandemic end became visible.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.75: Global synchronized rally; emerging markets, commodity currencies, all risk assets moved together.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Opened debate on policy exit timelines; began taper discussion that materialized in 2021.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Vaccine rollout optimism drove markets through mid-2021.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.70: Reopening trade partially reversed as variants emerged, but trend toward normalization durable.

events.narrative_zh: 辉瑞宣布COVID-19疫苗有效性超过90%，触发史上最大规模的价值股/周期股轮动——航空、酒店、能源、银行单日暴涨15-30%，而此前受益于封锁的Zoom、Peloton暴跌。这一天被称为'疫苗日'，标志着疫情经济学的根本性转折。

events.actor_zh: 中国政府 / 人民银行
events.action: China COVID stimulus — RRR cuts, credit expansion, infrastructure; China first in and first out of COVID

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.40: Chinese equities rebounded fastest globally; A-shares recovered by June 2020.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: PBOC rate cuts and credit easing; China yield curve stable.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.20: CNY appreciated 8% vs USD through 2020-2021 on recovery differential.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.25: China's rapid containment and stimulus provided global stability signal.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: China as first large economy recovering was critical for commodity (iron ore, copper) and EM stability.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.35: Less radical than Western QE; PBOC maintained more conventional toolkit intentionally.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: China's lead in recovery lasted through Delta wave in 2021.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.50: Credit expansion created property sector stress (Evergrande) requiring years of deleveraging.

events.narrative_zh: 中国以强力封控最早控制疫情，并以定向降准、信贷扩张和基建投资推动快速复苏，全年经济增长2.3%——成为2020年唯一正增长的主要经济体。人民币兑美元升值8%，铜、铁矿石价格在中国需求带动下创历史新高，成为大宗商品生产国的救生圈。

events.actor_zh: 弗拉基米尔·普京
events.action: Russia invasion of Ukraine — February 24 2022 full-scale invasion triggering energy crisis and sanctions

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.65: European equities -15% in weeks; Russian MOEX halted. Global equities -10% in Q1 2022.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.40: Inflation spike from energy prevented normal flight-to-safety rally; stagflation scenario pressured all bonds.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.80: RUB fell -50% then recovered via capital controls; EUR fell as energy importer; UAH -30%.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.85: VIX spiked to 37; European energy volatility extreme (natural gas 10x normal levels).
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.80: Global food inflation (wheat), energy crisis in Europe, EM debt stress, refugee crisis. Truly global shock.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.85: SWIFT exclusion as financial weapon unprecedented. USD weaponization debate. European energy independence pivot. NATO expansion.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: Energy crisis and geopolitical risk elevated through 2024; war ongoing.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.20: Structural changes to European energy policy, global security architecture, Russian economy. Largely irreversible.

events.narrative_zh: 俄罗斯全面入侵乌克兰，触发二战以来欧洲最大军事冲突。西方SWIFT切断俄罗斯银行间结算，冻结3000亿美元俄罗斯外汇储备。欧洲天然气价格飙升至正常水平10倍，全球小麦和化肥价格暴涨，引发全球性通胀冲击。这一事件从根本上重塑了欧洲能源格局和全球地缘政治秩序。

events.actor_zh: 弗拉基米尔·普京
events.action: European energy crisis weaponization — Nord Stream supply cuts, gas-for-rubles demand, energy blackmail

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.45: European industrial equities heavily impacted; BASF, Thyssenkrupp announced production cuts.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.35: Stagflation scenario — yields rising despite recession risk. ECB forced to hike despite recession fears.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.40: EUR/USD fell to parity (first time since 2002) on energy crisis severity.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.75: European gas options implied vol extreme; energy sector equity volatility highest since 1970s oil shocks.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.65: European deindustrialization risk; commodity import inflation globally; food crisis in EM.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: Europe's 30-year cheap Russian gas model destroyed permanently. LNG infrastructure, renewables acceleration.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Energy crisis peaked winter 2022-23; structural energy transition ongoing.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.30: Europe-Russia energy relationship permanently severed. LNG terminals built. No return to prior dependency.

events.narrative_zh: 俄罗斯将北溪管道供气量削减至正常水平的20%，随后完全切断，迫使欧洲面临潜在的工业停产危机。天然气价格飙升至正常水平的10倍，欧元兑美元跌破平价（21年来首次）。德国和法国宣布能源紧急状态，欧洲重新启动部分煤电，气候目标受到冲击。

events.actor_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔 / 美联储
events.action: 75bp rate hike June 2022 — first 75bp hike since 1994 as CPI hits 8.6%

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.50: S&P 500 entered bear market (-20%+) around June 2022 hike; growth/tech stocks -40-70%.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.55: Historic bond bear market; Bloomberg US Agg fell -13% in 2022, worst year since 1928.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.30: USD DXY rose to 20-year highs (114) as US rate differential attracted capital.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.75: VIX averaged 28 in H1 2022; rate hike path uncertainty extreme.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.60: Forced EM central banks to hike to defend currencies; global synchronized tightening cycle.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.70: 40-year low-rate era ended; ZIRP/QE framework abandoned. Central bank credibility crisis and recovery.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Tightening cycle ran June 2022 through July 2023; full impact through 2023.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.55: Rate eventually cut; but balance sheet normalization and higher equilibrium rate expectation more durable.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储将联邦基金利率提高75个基点——自1994年以来最大单次加息——回应CPI达到8.6%的41年高点。这开启了2022年美债历史上最糟糕的年份（-13%），以及全球同步紧缩周期。鲍威尔在杰克逊霍尔会议誓言不惜代价降低通胀，震撼全球资产市场。

events.actor_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔 / 美联储
events.action: Jackson Hole hawkish speech August 2022 — 'some pain' warning, commitment to sustained hikes

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.45: S&P 500 fell 3.4% on speech day; summer rally reversed. Stocks fell another 15% through October.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.40: 2yr UST yield rose sharply; yield curve inverted further. Stagflation fears.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.25: USD rose on higher-for-longer rate expectations.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.70: VIX rose from 20 to 26; speech removed any hope of Fed 'pivot' in 2022.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: UK gilt crisis (Truss mini-budget) followed weeks later, partly triggered by higher USD/rate environment.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Firmly closed door on premature pivot; established Powell's inflation-fighting credibility.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Hikes continued through July 2023; first cut only September 2024.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.60: Rate cutting cycle eventually began; speech's impact on policy path temporary but meaningful delay.

events.narrative_zh: 鲍威尔在杰克逊霍尔全球央行年会上发表仅8分钟的讲话，措辞之鹰派超出市场预期——'恢复价格稳定需要保持限制性政策一段时间……历史强烈警告不要过早放松政策'。S&P500当日下跌3.4%，夏季反弹全面终止。美联储随后连续四次加息75个基点。

events.actor_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德 / FTX
events.action: FTX collapse — $32B crypto exchange collapses in 72 hours after CoinDesk balance sheet leak

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.70: Bitcoin fell from $21k to $15.5k (-26%); broader crypto market cap fell $200B. Crypto-adjacent equities (Coinbase -20%).
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.15: Slight flight to safety from crypto to traditional assets.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.05: Minor; crypto not treated as currency by markets in flight dynamics.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.80: Crypto-specific vol extreme; contagion fear across all crypto platforms. 'Who's next?' panic.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.45: Crypto ecosystem (BlockFi, Genesis, Gemini Earn) severely affected; limited traditional finance contagion.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.40: Triggered global crypto regulatory push; US, EU, Hong Kong, Singapore all accelerated exchange regulation.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Crypto bear market through Q1 2023; regulatory uncertainty through 2023.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.55: Crypto markets recovered (Bitcoin ATH 2024); FTX creditors received ~100 cents recovery in 2024.

events.narrative_zh: CoinDesk披露Alameda Research资产负债表严重依赖FTX自发代币FTT后，触发币安CEO赵长鹏宣布出售持有的FTT，引发挤兑。FTX 72小时内崩溃，SBF被捕，揭露了客户资金被挪用于Alameda交易的欺诈行为。这是继MF Global后最大的客户资金安全事故，标志着'加密货币冬天'的最低点。

events.actor_zh: 格雷格·贝克尔 / 硅谷银行
events.action: SVB collapse — bank run triggered by botched capital raise, exposing duration mismatch in HTM portfolio

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.45: Regional bank sector (KRE) fell -30%; broader market -5%. First Horizon, PacWest followed.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.35: 2yr UST yield fell 100bp in one week — largest move since 1987 — as market priced in Fed pivot.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.05: Minor USD weakness; safe-haven dynamics muted by rate trajectory reassessment.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.85: MOVE index (bond volatility) spiked to highest since 2009. Banking sector vol extreme.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: Signature Bank closed same weekend; Credit Suisse emergency rescue followed within days — cross-Atlantic contagion.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.50: BTFP program created (Bank Term Funding Program) — new Fed facility effectively guaranteeing HTM at par.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 6: Regional bank stress lasted through mid-2023; deposit flight concerns elevated.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.65: FDIC backstop contained systemic spread; BTFP wound down; most deposit outflows stabilized.

events.narrative_zh: SVB为筹资22亿美元宣布出售210亿美元证券组合亏损18亿美元，引发科技行业存款人恐慌。彼得·蒂尔等风投建议投资组合公司立即提款，48小时内硅谷银行遭遇420亿美元挤兑。周末FDIC接管，联储随即宣布银行定期融资计划（BTFP），将存款担保实质性扩展至所有规模，2年期国债收益率创1987年以来最大单周跌幅。

events.actor_zh: 瑞士金融监管局 / 瑞士央行 / 瑞银
events.action: Credit Suisse forced sale to UBS — 167-year institution sold for CHF 3B in emergency weekend deal

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.40: CS AT1/CoCo bonds written to zero ($17B); global bank equities fell 8-15%.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.20: AT1 bond market globally collapsed (-20%); wiped out precedent for CoCo creditor hierarchy.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.15: CHF weakened; European bank credit spreads exploded.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.80: AT1 market freeze; European banking stress indices at highest since 2011. CDS on European banks spiked.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.65: Global AT1/CoCo market ($275B) repriced; Deutsche Bank CDS blew out in sympathy. European banking sector under pressure.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: AT1/CoCo creditor hierarchy inverted (equity holders got something, AT1 got zero) — unprecedented legal precedent.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 8: AT1 market recovered through end of 2023; systemic stress subsided.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.50: CS no longer exists as independent entity. AT1 market structure altered. Partial recovery of AT1 issuance.

events.narrative_zh: 受SVB倒闭传染影响，167年历史的瑞士信贷股价崩溃，沙特国家银行拒绝增资后挤兑加速。瑞士监管机构强制安排瑞银以30亿瑞郎收购（原市值120亿），并将170亿美元AT1资本债券直接减记为零，而股东仍获少量补偿——颠覆了传统债权人优先原则，AT1市场全球性崩溃。

events.actor_zh: 利兹·特拉斯 / 夸西·夸滕
events.action: UK mini-budget — unfunded £45B tax cuts triggering gilt crisis and BOE emergency intervention

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.35: UK equities fell 5%; housebuilders and consumer discretionary hardest hit on mortgage rate spike.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.85: 30yr gilt yield rose 150bp in 5 days — fastest move in UK gilt history. LDI pension fund crisis. BOE forced emergency purchases.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.65: GBP/USD touched 1.035, approaching parity and lowest since 1985. Near-maximum depreciation event.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.90: UK gilt market effectively dysfunctional; LDI pension funds facing margin calls that could trigger cascade. BOE emergency action.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.40: Primarily UK; but 'developed market credibility crisis' narrative had global implications for fiscal policy.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Mini-budget reversed within weeks; Truss resigned after 45 days. Demonstrated fiscal credibility constraints even in reserve currency countries.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 3: BOE emergency purchases reversed and gilt market stabilized within 3 months.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.80: Hunt reversed most measures; Truss resigned; markets recovered. Fiscal damage and mortgage rate shock more lasting.

events.narrative_zh: 夸滕宣布450亿英镑无抵消减税计划，英镑兑美元暴跌至接近平价（1985年以来最低），30年期英国国债收益率5天内飙升150个基点，创英国国债历史最快跌速。英国责任预算办公室对预算的批评引发彻底信任危机，英格兰银行被迫紧急介入购买国债。特拉斯在任45天后辞职。

events.actor_zh: 本·伯南克 / 美联储
events.action: Fed emergency rate cuts 2007-2008 — series of cuts from 5.25% to 0.25% September 2007 through December 2008

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.15: Rate cuts provided temporary equity support during cutting cycle; markets rallied briefly each time.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.40: UST yields fell substantially as Fed cut from 5.25% to 0%; 2yr UST fell from 5.0% to 0.7%.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.20: USD weakened significantly through 2007-2008 cutting cycle; DXY fell from 80 to 71.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.55: Each cut associated with temporary VIX reduction followed by renewed stress.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: Rate cutting cycle globally synchronized; ECB, BOE, BOC all followed eventually.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: Speed and scale of cutting unprecedented; established Fed willingness to use full rate toolkit proactively.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Cutting cycle ran Sep 2007 to Dec 2008; ZLB maintained until Dec 2015.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.50: Rate eventually normalized (2015-2018 hiking cycle), but zero lower bound became recurring framework.

events.narrative_zh: 伯南克自2007年9月启动降息周期，在14个月内将联邦基金利率从5.25%降至接近零的0-0.25%区间，降幅超过500个基点。每次降息都给市场带来短暂缓解，但随后危机不断深化。此降息周期的速度和幅度在美联储历史上前所未有，开创了零利率政策先例。

events.actor_zh: 蒂莫西·盖特纳 / 美国财政部
events.action: Bank stress tests (SCAP) — May 2009 Supervisory Capital Assessment Program results published

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.55: Stress test results marked near-precise bottom of financial sector; BofA, Citigroup rallied 50%+ in weeks.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.30: Bank bond spreads compressed significantly as capital shortfalls quantified and recapitalization paths defined.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.15: USD modestly supported by reduced systemic uncertainty.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.45: VIX fell from 40 to 25 in weeks following stress test publication; credibility of results accepted.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.50: US-centric but demonstrated government's ability to credibly quantify and backstop banking sector losses.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.45: Established stress testing as permanent regulatory tool; annual DFAST/CCAR tests continue today.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Bank sector recovery extended through 2010.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.70: Bank sector recovered; but stress testing as supervisory tool became permanent regulatory architecture.

events.narrative_zh: 盖特纳主导发布的银行压力测试结果，量化了19家最大银行的资本缺口共计746亿美元，并提供了清晰的增资路径。市场将此解读为'最坏已被量化且可控'的信号，美国银行股在随后数周内上涨50%以上，成为金融危机复苏的重要转折点。压力测试此后成为全球银行监管的标准工具。

events.actor_zh: 让-克洛德·特里谢 / 欧洲央行
events.action: ECB rate hike July 2008 — raised rates to 4.25% weeks before Lehman collapse, compounding eurozone stress

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.25: European equities fell; policy mistake amplified cyclical downturn.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.30: Peripheral eurozone sovereign spreads widened; rate hike worsened conditions for weaker members.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.20: EUR briefly strengthened but then fell sharply as policy error recognized.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.40: Added uncertainty to already fragile European financial conditions.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.40: Eurozone-focused; worsened southern European countries' debt dynamics ahead of Lehman.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.30: Policy error recognized; ECB reversed course within months. Contributed to ECB credibility reassessment.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 8: Reversed with rate cuts starting October 2008.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.65: ECB cut rates aggressively post-Lehman; policy error reversed. But contributed to weaker eurozone starting point.

events.narrative_zh: 特里谢领导的欧洲央行在金融危机已明显深化的2008年7月加息至4.25%，理由是通胀压力。这一决策被后来广泛认定为严重政策失误——在雷曼兄弟倒闭前6周收紧流动性，加速了欧元区外围国家的财政压力累积，并在此后欧债危机中留下历史污点。

events.actor_zh: 泰国央行 / 泰国政府
events.action: Thai baht float decision — Thailand abandons managed float and lets baht depreciate freely July 2 1997

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.75: SET Index fell 15% on float day; -75% total crisis drawdown.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.35: Thai sovereign spreads blew out; debt sustainability questioned.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.90: THB depreciated 18% on the day of float announcement; ultimately -55% vs USD.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.88: Regional FX volatility extreme; contagion fear across ASEAN immediate.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.65: Triggered immediate contagion to Philippine peso, Indonesian rupiah within days.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.70: Marked end of Asian managed currency peg era; preceded 1997 IMF programs.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 20: Thailand in economic contraction through 1998; recovery began 1999.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.30: Thai financial sector fundamentally reformed; currency regime never returned to prior peg structure.

events.narrative_zh: 泰国央行宣布放弃维护11年的泰铢管理汇率，泰铢当日贬值18%。此前泰国耗尽330亿美元外汇储备捍卫汇率，这一决定标志着泰国正式承认失败。由此触发的贬值浪潮席卷菲律宾、印尼、马来西亚和韩国，成为亚洲金融危机的正式起点。

events.actor_zh: 美联储 / 财政部
events.action: USD swap lines expansion — Fed expands swap lines to 14 central banks to resolve global dollar funding crisis

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.35: Dollar funding crisis resolution removed systemic tail risk; contributed to March 23 bottom.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.45: EM sovereign bonds stabilized as dollar funding crunch eased.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.50: Most acute dollar shortage episode since 2008 resolved; EM currencies stabilized.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.40: FX volatility and cross-currency basis swaps normalized rapidly after swap line expansion.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.70: Globally critical — resolved March 2020 dollar funding crisis affecting all EM economies simultaneously.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.40: Expanded Fed's role as global lender of last resort; reconfirmed USD centrality.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 3: Dollar funding crisis resolved within weeks; swap lines maintained as precaution.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.75: Temporary facility; wound down by year end. But precedent of rapid swap line expansion permanent.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储在2020年3月将美元掉期额度扩展至14家央行（包括欧洲央行、日本银行、英格兰银行、加拿大央行、澳大利亚央行、韩国央行等），解决了全球美元融资危机。3月中旬跨货币基差互换利差一度达到150个基点——与2008年危机相当——美联储的行动在数天内将其压缩至接近正常水平，防止了新兴市场债务危机的大规模爆发。

events.actor_zh: 美联储 / 联邦存款保险公司 / 财政部
events.action: SVB/Signature emergency backstop — FDIC bridge bank + BTFP facility guaranteeing all deposits above FDIC limits

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.40: Financial sector stabilized after initial shock; BTFP announcement prevented broader bank run contagion.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.25: 2yr yield partially recovered from 100bp crash as systemic fears reduced.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.05: USD modestly supported by demonstrated willingness to backstop banking system.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.50: MOVE index (bond vol) fell sharply on BTFP; KBW bank index stabilized.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.45: Prevented bank run contagion to First Republic, PacWest, Western Alliance.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: BTFP effectively removed HTM losses from bank balance sheets; implicit extension of FDIC coverage to all deposits — significant precedent.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 6: BTFP maintained; First Republic still failed (May 2023) but systemic spread contained.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.60: BTFP wound down March 2024; temporary facility. But deposit guarantee precedent debated in Congress.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储、FDIC和财政部在周末紧急宣布：硅谷银行和签名银行所有存款（包括超出FDIC25万美元上限部分）均获全额保障；同时推出银行定期融资计划（BTFP），允许银行以面值而非市值将国债抵押融资。这一揽子措施防止了区域银行系统性挤兑，但实质上是非官方的全额存款保险。

events.actor_zh: 美联储
events.action: Fed 2019 insurance cuts — three 25bp cuts July-October 2019 citing trade uncertainty as primary justification

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.20: S&P 500 at record highs in 2019 partly due to Fed pivot; equity market cushioned from trade war damage.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.20: Yield curve steepened; 10yr rose from inverted levels as recession risk reduced.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.05: USD slightly pressured by lower rates.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.25: VIX declined to sub-15 range on Fed support.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.30: Global central bank easing cycle followed Fed; ECB, PBOC, RBA all eased.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.25: Reversed 2018 hiking path; established trade war uncertainty as monetary policy variable.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 8: Cuts maintained through COVID emergency cuts in March 2020.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.80: Rates subsequently cut to zero in March 2020; these cuts merged into COVID response.

events.narrative_zh: 美联储以贸易战引发的经济不确定性为由，在2019年7月至10月三次降息25个基点，将联邦基金利率从2.5%降至1.75%。这是罕见的将地缘政治/贸易政策不确定性作为货币政策主要变量的案例，标志着贸易战对全球货币政策产生了直接传导效应。

events.actor_zh: 欧洲央行 / 克里斯蒂娜·拉加德
events.action: ECB rate hike cycle — from -0.5% to 4.0%, fastest tightening in ECB history 2022-2023

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.35: European equities in bear market during tightening cycle; STOXX 600 -18% in 2022.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.45: Historic European bond bear market; Bund yields from -0.5% to 2.5%; BTPs under pressure throughout.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.15: EUR/USD fell to parity despite rate hikes (energy crisis overwhelmed rate differential).
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.65: VSTOXX elevated throughout tightening cycle; TPI instrument activation risk kept spreads volatile.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.55: Globally coordinated tightening with Fed; synchronized rate rises triggered EM capital outflows.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.65: End of negative rate era (first positive rate since 2014); quantitative tightening begun; TPI (anti-fragmentation tool) introduced.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Hike cycle July 2022 to September 2023.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.55: Rate cutting cycle began June 2024; negative rates not expected to return.

events.narrative_zh: 欧洲央行在2022年7月至2023年9月以史上最快节奏将基准利率从-0.5%上调至4.0%，结束了长达8年的负利率政策。同时推出传导保护工具（TPI）防止周边国家利差过度扩张，但欧元/美元仍跌破平价——能源危机的影响完全压过了利率上升对欧元的支撑。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 美国行政当局
events.action: Liberation Day — Reciprocal tariff declaration: 10% universal baseline, EU 20%, China 34% (additional), Vietnam 46%. Effective April 5, 2025.

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.10: Immediate announcement day move; the severe crash (-10% S&P in 2 days) follows April 4-9. Day-of reaction captured here at moderate negative.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.25: Flight to safety bid — 10-year Treasury yield dropped from ~4.5% to 4.045% within days as recession fears drove bond buying.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.08: DXY fell ~2% on Liberation Day — loss of safe-haven shine as tariff policy seen as self-harming. Moderate depreciation.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.72: VIX spiked sharply. Tariff shock was largest 2-day equity loss in history ($6.6T wiped over April 4-9).
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.65: All major equity markets affected; global supply chain uncertainty spread to EM and developed markets.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.60: Major paradigm departure from post-WW2 free trade consensus; but partially reversed (90-day pause April 9) — hence not maximum.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 3: Acute phase 2 days (April 2-9); truce announced May 12 began recovery; 3 months captures full acute-to-stabilization period.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.55: 90-day pause partially reversed; Geneva truce (May 12) further moderated; but IEEPA tariffs struck down Feb 2026 and new 10% reimposed. Structural trade uncertainty persists.

events.narrative_zh: 特朗普宣布'解放日'对等关税：对所有美国进口商品征收10%基础税率，欧盟20%，中国34%（附加在已有税率上）。两天内标普500下跌约10%，市值蒸发6.6万亿美元，创历史上最大两日跌幅。4月9日特朗普宣布90天暂停，市场大幅反弹，但对华关税升至145%。

events.actor: Donald Trump / Xi Jinping — US-China Joint Statement
events.actor_zh: 特朗普 / 习近平 — 日内瓦贸易停战
events.action: Geneva Trade Truce — US and China reduce April tariffs from 125% to 10% each for 90-day truce. Both sides step back from 145%/125% tariff spiral.

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.65: S&P 500 turned positive for 2025 on May 13; strong relief rally. Trade deal optimism drove markets to all-time highs by June 27, 2025.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.15: Risk-on shift caused rotation out of safe-haven bonds; yields rose moderately as recession fears receded.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.12: Mild DXY recovery as US-China deal removed worst-case trade war scenario.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.45: VIX compression — truce significantly reduced uncertainty. Negative = volatility-reducing event.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: -0.30: Negative contagion = reduced spread of trade war uncertainty; global risk appetite recovered.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.35: Major de-escalation within the tariff war framework — not a return to pre-Liberation Day baseline but significant moderation.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 6: Extended to August 12 (90-day extension) then November 2025 one-year deal. 6-month acute relief phase.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.60: Truce is time-limited (through November 2026); underlying trade conflict not resolved; IEEPA authority struck down Feb 2026 adds uncertainty.

events.narrative_zh: 美中在日内瓦举行贸易谈判，双方同意将4月加征的关税从125%分别降至10%，为期90天的停战协议。市场大幅反弹，标普500于5月13日转正，6月27日创历史新高。停战后延期至2025年11月，达成为期一年的延期协议。

events.actor_zh: 美国最高法院
events.action: Learning Resources, Inc. v. Trump — 6-3 ruling striking down IEEPA-based reciprocal tariffs and Canada/Mexico/China fentanyl tariffs. $175B+ in collected tariff revenue at refund risk.

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: 0.35: Initial relief rally as tariff uncertainty reduced; businesses facing potential $175B refund also buoyed import-dependent sectors.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: -0.08: Fiscal uncertainty (government facing $175B liability) slightly negative for Treasuries at margin.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.15: Mild USD appreciation as reduced tariff inflation pressure removed one headwind.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: -0.20: Reduced policy uncertainty — negative = volatility-calming. Market had partially priced in legal risk.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.20: US-centered legal ruling with global implications for trade partners expecting tariff reduction.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.75: Fundamental legal constraint on presidential tariff authority — IEEPA no longer available for broad tariffs. Major structural shift in US trade policy framework.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 18: Legal framework change will shape trade policy for years; 18 months captures near-term adjustment period as new authorities (Section 232/301/Trade Act 1974) are deployed.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.45: SCOTUS ruling is structural (cannot be reversed by executive), but Congress could authorize new tariff authority; Trump pivoted to 10% global tariff under alternative authority. Partially reversible through legislative action.

events.narrative_zh: 最高法院以6比3裁定特朗普无权依据《国际紧急经济权力法》（IEEPA）征收广泛的对等关税及对加拿大/墨西哥/中国的芬太尼关税。已征收的逾1750亿美元关税面临退款风险。特朗普随即宣布依据《1974年贸易法》重新征收10%全球关税。

events.actor_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普 / 美国军事
events.action: Operation Absolute Resolve — US air, land and sea attack on Venezuela; President Maduro and wife captured, transferred to New York on narco-terrorism charges.

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.02: Market essentially shrugged off the operation. S&P 500 mostly flat; defense stocks outperformed. Near-zero net equity impact.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.03: Minimal safe-haven bid — market assessed Venezuela operation as contained. Near-zero bond market move.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.35: Venezuelan bolivar effectively worthless in any case. Broader EM currencies saw mild risk-off but limited transmission.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.15: Mild VIX uptick on geopolitical uncertainty but analysts noted 'positive [market] response is fascinating.' Limited volatility impact.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.10: Primarily Latin American regional risk repricing. No systemic global impact — Venezuela's $800K bbl/day production negligible in oversupplied market.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.25: Precedent-setting: US willing to conduct military operations to effect regime change in Western Hemisphere. Signal to Latin American states and China (with $67B Venezuelan exposure).
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 2: Acute phase brief; Venezuelan political uncertainty ongoing but market impact dissipated quickly.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.80: Market impact fully reversible; Delcy Rodríguez as interim president means regime partial continuity. Not a structural market change.

events.narrative_zh: 美国出动约150架飞机对委内瑞拉发动'陆海空'军事打击，马杜罗总统及其妻子被捕并移送纽约受审。委内瑞拉产量仅约80万桶/日，全球原油市场供应充裕，市场反应极为平淡——布伦特原油实际小幅下跌至约60美元/桶，股市基本未受影响。对中国的冲击更深层：中国在委内瑞拉有约670亿美元投资，此次行动重置了美国对拉美干预的战略预期。

events.actor_zh: 美国/以色列联合军事行动
events.action: Decapitation strike on Iran — Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei killed alongside Defense Minister, IRGC Commander, and Security Council Secretary. Brent crude surged from $70 to $94/bbl within 10 days.
