vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.28: S&P 500 down ~28% YTD by March 9, 2026 from post-holiday highs. Severe equity selloff driven by oil shock, recession fears, and geopolitical uncertainty.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.35: Partial flight to safety in US Treasuries despite oil inflation risk — war premium drove some safe-haven demand even as inflation pressures mounted.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.12: USD volatile — oil inflation headwind vs. safe-haven demand created mixed signal. Net modest depreciation on global recession risk.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.88: Near-extreme volatility. Dow dropped 1,200 points intraday March 1 (recovered to -400 close). Crude oil vol extreme. World shares tumbled March 9.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.80: Near-global impact: Gulf state airspace closed (UAE, Qatar, Kuwait); thousands of flights grounded; gas pump prices surged 21% in one month; global recession risk flagged.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.85: Fundamental geopolitical shift: US/Israel directly assassinated a sitting head of state of a major OPEC nation. Precedent for 'decapitation diplomacy'. OPEC oil supply security framework permanently repriced.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 24: War premium on oil likely sustained 12-24 months; geopolitical restructuring of Middle East (new Supreme Leader, proxy war intensification) is multi-year structural shift.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.20: Khamenei assassination is irreversible. New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei installed March 11. Structural regime change. Oil price normalization possible if Hormuz opens but geopolitical framework permanently altered.

events.narrative_zh: 美以联合军事行动击杀伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊及多名高级官员。布伦特原油从约70美元/桶飙升至3月9日的94美元/桶（涨幅超50%），为2023年9月以来最高。霍尔木兹海峡受限（全球约20%石油供应），海湾国家空域关闭，数千架次航班停飞。标普500 2026年迄今跌幅约28%。摩根大通警告：若冲突持续，油价可能触及120美元/桶，全球经济衰退风险上升。

events.actor_zh: DeepSeek / 中国AI实验室
events.action: DeepSeek R1 release — model benchmarked comparably to OpenAI o1 at ~$6M training cost vs ~$100M for GPT-4. Became #1 US Apple App Store January 27, 2025. Sent shockwaves through Western AI investment thesis.

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.25: Nvidia lost ~$600B in market cap in a single day (largest single-day market cap loss in history at the time). Broader AI infrastructure complex (data centers, power, memory) sold off sharply.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.05: Marginal safe-haven bid as tech selloff drove some rotation. Negligible bond market impact.
vector_justification.currency_direction: 0.08: RMB mild appreciation as China's AI competitiveness narrative boosted sentiment on Chinese assets.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.55: Significant but sector-concentrated VIX/VVIX spike. Not systemic — confined to AI/semiconductor complex.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.45: Primarily tech/AI sector globally. Some spillover to power, cooling, data center REITs. Limited macro-financial contagion.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.40: Fundamental challenge to US AI dominance narrative and the assumption that AI leadership requires massive capital expenditure moat. Reframed US-China AI competition dynamics.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 4: Acute AI infrastructure selloff lasted weeks; revaluation of AI capex thesis took ~4 months to stabilize as hyperscalers maintained spending commitments.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.50: Nvidia recovered substantially as hyperscalers maintained AI investment plans. But the narrative shift (Chinese AI as competitive threat, efficiency gains possible at low cost) is semi-permanent.

events.narrative_zh: DeepSeek R1发布，训练成本仅约600万美元（GPT-4约1亿美元），但性能堪比OpenAI o1。1月27日登顶美国苹果应用商店榜首，引发全球AI投资逻辑重估。英伟达单日市值蒸发约6000亿美元，创史上最大单日市值损失记录。此事件重塑了市场对AI算力需求、GPU护城河以及中美AI竞争格局的基本认知。

events.actor: Xi Jinping / CPC Central Military Commission
events.actor_zh: 习近平 / 中央军事委员会
events.action: Zhang Youxia (CMC Vice Chairman) and Liu Zhenli (Joint Staff Chief) arrested January 24, 2026. CMC reduced to Xi + one loyalist. 100+ senior PLA officers purged since 2022.

vector_justification.equity_market_direction: -0.12: A-shares and Hong Kong equities sold off moderately on Taiwan invasion risk repricing. Western capital markets had limited direct reaction.
vector_justification.bond_market_direction: 0.08: Mild safe-haven demand in UST as Taiwan risk premium was repriced. Chinese government bonds saw outflow pressure.
vector_justification.currency_direction: -0.05: RMB under mild pressure as geopolitical risk premium on China assets increased.
vector_justification.volatility_impact: 0.35: Moderate volatility increase in China-exposed assets; Taiwan-related risk premium in options markets elevated.
vector_justification.contagion_scope: 0.30: Primarily affecting China/Taiwan/Asia-Pacific asset pricing. Limited direct Western financial market impact.
vector_justification.policy_regime_shift: 0.55: Structural change in PLA command authority — CMC reduced to single general alongside Xi. Joint Staff Department vacant. Significant shift in China's military decision-making architecture and Taiwan risk calculus.
vector_justification.duration_of_impact_months: 12: Structural military command change has multi-year implications; 12-month period captures immediate Taiwan risk repricing.
vector_justification.reversibility: 0.25: Structural purge of military leadership creates lasting capability and organizational impacts. Not reversible in the near term.

events.narrative_zh: 习近平逮捕军委副主席张又侠（与习近平同为'太子党'）和联合参谋部参谋长刘振立，打破了历史先例。军委实际上只剩张升民一名上将与习近平并列。自2022年以来，解放军100余名高级官员遭清洗，52%的176个高层领导职位受到影响。分析人士将此事件重新解读为台湾行动时间窗口的先行指标——移除军内最后具有制衡能力的将领，台湾风险溢价随之上升。

duration_of_impact_months.shortest: Lagarde gaffe (1 month, reversed by PEPP)

summary_statistics.methodology_notes: Vectors calibrated against documented market data: index levels, yield curves, FX rates, VIX readings, and economic outcomes. Policy regime shift and reversibility incorporate post-crisis structural changes as assessed through 2026. Duration reflects statistically significant market impact, not necessarily peak-to-trough of underlying crisis.
